title: 敬愛を抱きて誠意尽くすが礼

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So these are my training exercises for this week? I
see.
choice_data_list:
I'm glad you're motivated to train on your own,
but try not to overdo it.

I'm glad you're motivated to train on your own,
but try not to overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Duly noted. I'm going to get changed now, and
then I'll meet you on the field.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hold on to me for support!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm all right. It's nothing serious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'll have to redo my taping so it's tighter.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is it all right for you to be running while you're in
pain?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. This level of pain is well within my threshold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm minding my limits carefully. I want to avoid
the possibility of being rendered unable to race in
the Japanese Derby at all costs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You don't have to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm prepared to wager my very life at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And if I were to burn out, never to race again, so
be it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Rather... I wish to burn out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If by burning up, I can cast a brilliant light that
serves as proof that I existed, then I would gladly
do just that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I dream of running with you, Chiyono O, and
everyone else in a race so grand, its splendor
shines on forever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So please, you must focus on your own training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Very well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I vow to give you a race that lives up to your
conviction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you for that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And thank you for listening to my request.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to use the Japanese Derby to leave a mark
on the racing world that lasts, no matter the
cost—just as my sister did.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Her legs were a source of much worry for her
when she was young as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However, she overcame that weakness and went
on to become the first Triple Tiara champion in
history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The glory she won is so brilliant that she shines as
the crown jewel of the Mejiro family even today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I wish to shine just like she did, to leave tangible
proof of my existence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I am to etch my name in perpetuity, then there's
no honor more fitting than victory at the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I must win the Derby, if nothing else!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki trains diligently without uttering a
single word. Her hardened gaze exudes a
determination that was absent from our meeting
earlier.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to do another lap. I felt that my
acceleration was lacking.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, wheeze... Urk! Cough, hack!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... This isn't... good enough...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I can't even run this distance without struggling,
there's no way I can win a 2,400-meter race...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen entrusted her hopes to me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I have to try harder! Much, much, much harder! Until I break my limits!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll let anyone have the Japanese
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win it for Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even at this distance, I can feel the sting of
Chiyono O's spirit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She's like a wild wolf, determined to seize my
throat and tear it asunder.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She's so bent on attaining victory, she's willing to
push past her body's limits with no concern for her
well-being...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And Ardan is willing to quite literally put her life
on the line, all for the sake of releasing a split
second's worth of precious light...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Competing in the Japanese Derby is a
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and both of them
are staking everything for the chance to win.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But even though I'm aware of the dreams and
determination they hold dear in their hearts, I will
not back down.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall seize victory, even if it means I must shatter
their dreams!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hereby vow to face them with all that I have in
honorable combat!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'd like to go on another run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps inspired by Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro
Ardan, Yaeno Muteki's eyes starts to glow with a
new, intense fire.
